single: One thing, fully. Single-tasking is how focus compounds.
start: Starting is the hard part — and you already did it.
identity: You’re not trying; you’re becoming the kind of person who shows up.
reps: Small reps, repeated, beat rare bursts of effort.
attention: Attention is the rarest resource. This is where you spend it.
protect: Protect this block. Distraction is a choice you can decline.
done: Done beats perfect. Finish the loop and feel the lift.
breathe: Breathe. A calm mind focuses sharper than a rushed one.
